title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Asian Paints

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Asian Paints
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!
